MV VISHVA VINAY
Indian Flag Blt 2012 (STX Dalian)
Dwt / Draft : Summer abt 80,139t on 14.45 m
Grt 44007 / Nrt 26658 TPC 70.3
Loa 229 m/Beam 32.24 m
Holds/Hatches 7Ho / 7Ha
Types of hatches : Side Rolling type
Grain capacity (cbm ) 95148
 
Speed /Consumption: 
Abt 12.5 k (B) on abt 27.0 mt Ifo 380 cst + abt 0.1 mt Mdo 
Abt 12.5 k (L) on abt 28.0 mt Ifo 380 cst + abt 0.1 mt Mdo 
 
Port Idle : abt 3.1 mt Ifo 380 cst + abt 0.1 mt mdo 
Port Working : abt 4.0 mt Ifo 380 cst + abt 0.1 mt mdo 
 
Speed/Consumption under good weather conditions up to wind 
force 4 of Beaufort scale and Douglas sea state 3 with no adverse 
current and no negative influence of swell. 
The vessel entitles to use additional Ifo/Gas oil for main engine/ 
generator engines when maneuvering in narrow/shallow waters, 
canals, rivers, in/out port, shift of generator engine, overhauling 
piston etc, under the direction of master.
